item.title: Dachepalli Publishers Ltd Upgraded to Hold on Technical Improvements and Valuation Appeal
item.description: Dachepalli Publishers Ltd has seen its investment rating upgraded from Sell to Hold, reflecting a notable shift in technical indicators and valuation metrics. The company’s improved technical trend, attractive valuation, and steady financial performance have collectively contributed to this reassessment, despite ongoing concerns about debt servicing capacity. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: KSH International Ltd Downgraded to Sell Amid Technical and Valuation Concerns
item.description: KSH International Ltd, a small-cap player in the industrial products sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell as of 13 April 2026. The revision reflects a combination of deteriorating technical indicators, expensive valuation metrics, and a cautious outlook on financial trends despite some operational improvements. This article analyses the four key parameters that triggered the downgrade and what it means for investors. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Physicswallah Ltd Downgraded to Sell Amid Technical and Financial Concerns
item.description: Physicswallah Ltd, a mid-cap player in the Other Consumer Services sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell as of 13 April 2026. This shift reflects a deterioration in technical indicators alongside persistent financial challenges, despite some positive quarterly results. The downgrade is driven by a comprehensive reassessment across quality, valuation, financial trends, and technical parameters. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Tata Capital Ltd Downgraded to Sell by MarketsMOJO Amid Valuation and Technical Concerns
item.description: Tata Capital Ltd, a prominent player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell as of 13 April 2026. This shift reflects a combination of deteriorating technical indicators, stretched valuation metrics, and a cautious outlook on financial trends despite the company’s large-cap status and steady operational performance. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Wework India Management Ltd Downgraded to Strong Sell Amid Valuation and Technical Concerns
item.description: Wework India Management Ltd has seen its investment rating downgraded from Sell to Strong Sell as of 13 April 2026, reflecting deteriorating technical indicators and an increasingly expensive valuation profile. Despite some operational improvements, the company’s weak financial fundamentals and challenging market trends have prompted a reassessment of its outlook within the diversified commercial services sector. Time: 6 hours ago
